name: Cracker Jill
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Mix the popped corn and peanuts in a very large bowl and keep warm in the oven set at 250°F (120°C).
3. Melt the butter in a heavy saucepan.
4. Stir in the brown sugar, corn syrup, and salt, then bring to a full rolling boil, stirring constantly.
5. Boil without stirring for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in baking soda and vanilla.
7. Quickly pour over the warm popcorn mix and stir until well coated.
8. Bake in a shallow pan or cookie sheet for 45 minutes, stirring every 15 minutes.
